anime_pulse_items.title: One Piece Chapter 1118: Luffy vs. Imu Face-off Begins!
anime_pulse_items.summary: The latest One Piece manga chapter drops a bombshell as Luffy finally confronts Imu in a clash that will decide the fate of the world. Fans are theorizing about the Void Century revelations as Oda sets up the final saga. Chapter sales have already broken records within 24 hours.

anime_pulse_items.title: Death Note: New Anime Project Announced for 2027!
anime_pulse_items.summary: In a shocking announcement, Studio Madhouse reveals a new Death Note anime adaptation set to premiere in 2027. The project will cover the original story with modern animation and additional scenes. Social media explodes with mixed reactions.

anime_pulse_items.title: Jujutsu Kaisen Season 3: Trailer Reveals Shibuya Aftermath
anime_pulse_items.summary: Crunchyroll drops the official trailer for Jujutsu Kaisen Season 3, showcasing the aftermath of the Shibuya Incident and the introduction of the Culling Games arc. The trailer has garnered over 10 million views in 12 hours, signaling massive anticipation.

anime_pulse_items.title: Demon Slayer: Infinity Castle Movie Breaks Box Office Records
anime_pulse_items.summary: The Demon Slayer: Infinity Castle movie has surpassed $500 million globally in its first week, becoming the highest-grossing anime film of all time. Fans praise the animation and emotional depth as the story reaches its climax.

anime_pulse_items.title: Attack on Titan: Final Season Post-Finale Discussion Heats Up
anime_pulse_items.summary: Reddit's r/ShingekiNoKyojin is ablaze with theories about the 'Final Panels' extra chapter released today. Fans debate the fate of Paradis and the meaning of the final scene. The subreddit sees 500k new posts in 24 hours.

anime_pulse_items.title: My Hero Academia: Final Arc Reaches Climax - Chapter 430 Spoilers
anime_pulse_items.summary: My Hero Academia chapter 430 leaks reveal a major character death and the final battle between Deku and Shigaraki. The series is set to end in June, and fans are emotional. Manga sales spike 300% overnight.

anime_pulse_items.title: Chainsaw Man Season 2: Release Date Confirmed for July 2026
anime_pulse_items.summary: Netflix confirms Chainsaw Man Season 2 will premiere on July 15, 2026, covering the International Assassins arc. A new trailer showcases Denji's new forms and introduces new characters. Fans are hyped for the darker tone.

anime_pulse_items.title: Spy x Family Season 3: New Trailer Shows Loid's Past
anime_pulse_items.summary: Crunchyroll releases the first trailer for Spy x Family Season 3, revealing flashbacks to Loid's childhood and a new mission that threatens the Forger family. The trailer trends worldwide on Twitter within an hour.

anime_pulse_items.title: Frieren: Season 2 Announced with First Visual
anime_pulse_items.summary: Following its massive success, Frieren: Beyond Journey's End gets a second season announced by Madhouse. A key visual shows Frieren and Fern in a new region. The series won Anime of the Year at the Crunchyroll Awards last month.

anime_pulse_items.title: Solo Leveling Season 2: Premiere Date and New Key Visual
anime_pulse_items.summary: Solo Leveling Season 2 is set to premiere on June 1, 2026, on Crunchyroll. The new key visual features Jin-Woo facing the Ant King. Fans compare the animation quality to the popular manhwa.

anime_pulse_items.title: Naruto: New Boruto Manga Chapter Reveals Kawaki's True Plan
anime_pulse_items.summary: Boruto chapter 85 leaks show Kawaki's ultimate goal to seal all ninja in a different dimension. The Boruto subreddit explodes with theories about Naruto's return. The manga's popularity surges as the story reaches a turning point.

anime_pulse_items.title: Dragon Ball Daima: New Series Gets Release Date and Trailer
anime_pulse_items.summary: Toei Animation announces Dragon Ball Daima, a new series set after the Buu saga, premiering in October 2026. The trailer shows Goku as a child again, sparking nostalgia. Fans are divided but excited.

anime_pulse_items.title: Crunchyroll Adds 10 New Simulcasts for Spring 2026 Lineup
anime_pulse_items.summary: Crunchyroll announces 10 new simulcast licenses for the spring season, including highly anticipated titles like 'The Rising of the Shield Hero Season 4' and 'That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime Season 3'. The platform expands its library with exclusive dubs.

anime_pulse_items.title: Netflix Announces Live-Action 'One Piece' Season 2 Casting
anime_pulse_items.summary: Netflix reveals the cast for One Piece live-action season 2, including new actors for Chopper and Robin. The series is set to start filming in June. Fans are cautiously optimistic after season 1's success.

anime_pulse_items.title: Reddit's r/anime Hits 10 Million Subscribers Milestone
anime_pulse_items.summary: The r/anime subreddit reaches 10 million subscribers, celebrating with a community event. The milestone reflects the growing global otaku community. Top posts feature fan art and discussions about the best anime of the decade.

anime_pulse_items.title: Death Note: Limited Edition Blu-ray Box Set Sells Out in Hours
anime_pulse_items.summary: A new Death Note limited edition Blu-ray box set with exclusive art and a replica Death Note notebook sells out on Crunchyroll Store within 3 hours. Scalpers list items for triple the price on eBay.

anime_pulse_items.title: One Piece: Manga Enters Final Arc - Oda's Statement
anime_pulse_items.summary: Eiichiro Oda releases a statement confirming that One Piece has entered its final arc, with the story ending in 2027. Fans worldwide react with a mix of sadness and excitement. The announcement trends on Twitter globally.
